summary: Phase 3: Item Modifiers & Notes - Complete Testing. All backend API tests passed (11/11). All frontend UI tests passed. Full modifier flow working: pencil icon → customize modal → ingredients toggle/extras/notes → save → display in order panel → display in KDS.
critical_code_review_comments: ItemCustomizeModal.js is well-structured with proper loading states and form handling
TapPage.js and TablePage.js properly integrate the customize modal with onSaved callback to reload session
KitchenPage.js correctly renders modifiers (No X, Extra X) from ticket items
seed_data_creation: Test sessions created with prefix TEST_ (TEST_ModifierGuest, TEST_InlineModifier, TEST_CustomizeFlow, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 Modifiers & Notes feature is fully working. The customize modal opens when clicking pencil icon on order items (hover to reveal). Modifiers are persisted and displayed correctly in order panel (No X for removed, Extra X for extras) and in KDS tickets.

backend_apis.get_catalog_item: ✅ PASSED - Returns single item with default_ingredients
backend_apis.update_item_modifiers: ✅ PASSED - PUT /api/tap/session/{id}/item/{id} updates modifiers and notes
backend_apis.get_session: ✅ PASSED - Returns items with modifiers field
backend_apis.void_item: ✅ PASSED - Works correctly after modifiers added
backend_apis.add_item_with_inline_modifiers: ✅ PASSED - Modifiers parameter accepted during add
backend_apis.kds_tickets_bar: ✅ PASSED - Bar tickets also have modifiers
backend_apis.closed_session_modifier_rejection: ✅ PASSED - Returns 400 when trying to modify closed session

tap_page.loads_correctly: ✅ PASSED - POS layout with categories and items
tap_page.barman_selector: ✅ PASSED - Can select barman from dropdown
tap_page.tab_selection: ✅ PASSED - Clicking tab shows detail in right panel
tap_page.add_item_fast_add: ✅ PASSED - Clicking menu item adds to order
tap_page.pencil_icon_on_order_items: ✅ PASSED - Appears on hover over order items
tap_page.modal_shows_ingredients: ✅ PASSED - Ingredients section with toggles (e.g., Chicken wings, Hot sauce, Celery sticks, Blue cheese dip)
tap_page.modal_shows_extras: ✅ PASSED - Extras input with add button
tap_page.toggle_ingredient_off: ✅ PASSED - Clicking ingredient marks as REMOVED
tap_page.add_extra: ✅ PASSED - Adding text and clicking + adds extra
tap_page.save_customization: ✅ PASSED - Calls PUT API and reloads session
tap_page.modifiers_display_in_order: ✅ PASSED - Shows 'No X' (red) and 'Extra X' (green) under item

table_page.table_selection: ✅ PASSED - Clicking busy table shows session
table_page.customize_modal_opens: ✅ PASSED - Same modal as TAP page

kitchen_page.kitchen_bar_toggle: ✅ PASSED - Can switch between Kitchen and Bar
kitchen_page.tickets_show_modifiers: ✅ PASSED - 'No X' and 'Extra X' text found in tickets
